reasoning: The community prediction was 3% on October 16, 2025. With only about two and a half months until the resolution date (January 1, 2026), the fact that the probability is so low indicates that the condition (four out of the seven Magnificent Seven stocks closing at least 50% below their all-time highs) has not yet been met. For this to manifest between late October and the end of the year, at least four of these mega-cap stocks would need to suffer catastrophic drawdowns in a remarkably short period. The probability of such a severe, correlated "black swan" market crash occurring within an ~10-week window is exceptionally low. I am adopting the market consensus of 0.03.
